'''gashono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearsomeness|fearsomeness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearsomeness|fearsomeness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gashono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæsheneth|gæsheneth]] || [[word:gæshenej|gæshenej]] || [[word:gæshenesh|gæshenesh]] || [[word:gæshene|gæshene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashoshonoth|gashoshonoth]] || [[word:gashoshonoj|gashoshonoj]] || [[word:gashoshonosh|gashoshonosh]] || [[word:gashoshono|gashoshono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashonoth|gashonoth]] || [[word:gashonoj|gashonoj]] || [[word:gashonosh|gashonosh]] || [[word:gashono|gashono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashofnofth|gashofnofth]] || [[word:gashofnofj|gashofnofj]] || [[word:gashofnofsh|gashofnofsh]] || [[word:gashofnof|gashofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gashonotho|gashonotho]] || [[word:gashonojo|gashonojo]] || [[word:gashonosho|gashonosho]] || [[word:gashonoko|gashonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gashonoth|gashonoth]] || [[word:gashonoj|gashonoj]] || [[word:gashonosh|gashonosh]] || [[word:gashono|gashono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gashonothol|gashonothol]] || [[word:gashonojol|gashonojol]] || [[word:gashonoshol|gashonoshol]] || [[word:gashonokol|gashonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gashonoothotho|gashonoothotho]] || [[word:gashonoojojo|gashonoojojo]] || [[word:gashonooshosho|gashonooshosho]] || [[word:gashonooko|gashonooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gashonothon|gashonothon]] || [[word:gashonojon|gashonojon]] || [[word:gashonoshon|gashonoshon]] || [[word:gashonokon|gashonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gashonothooro|gashonothooro]] || [[word:gashonojooro|gashonojooro]] || [[word:gashonoshooro|gashonoshooro]] || [[word:gashonokooro|gashonokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
